title: caralluma atrosanguinea
intro: Caralluma atrosanguinea is a species of plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as a type of cactus or succulent. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to suppress appetite and aid in weight loss due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to inhibit the production of an enzyme that stimulates appetite. The health benefits of Caralluma atrosanguinea include reducing hunger and increasing feelings of fullness, leading to weight loss and improved overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Caralluma atrosanguinea is often consumed as a capsule or tablet, or taken as a powder, typically in doses of 500-1000mg per day.
